query: The implementation is complete. The diff has 30 lines changed across 2 files. Configure Phase 4 review for this: show reviewer count, debate rounds, and which reviewers to spawn.

assertions.text: Uses lead self-review (no teammate reviewers spawned)
assertions.check: output specifies that no teammate reviewers are spawned — either '0 reviewers spawned', '1 (lead self-review)', or 'lead performs self-review'
output specifies no debate or 0 debate rounds
output mentions solo self-review, lead self-review, or solo checklist

query: The implementation is complete. The diff has 120 lines changed across 5 files. Configure Phase 4 review: show reviewer count, debate rounds, and which reviewers to spawn.

assertions.check: output names Correctness reviewer and Architecture reviewer (not DX reviewer)
output explicitly skips or omits DX reviewer

description: 201–400 lines → 3 reviewers, full debate (2 rounds max)
query: The implementation is complete. The diff has 280 lines changed across 12 files. Configure Phase 4 review: show reviewer count, debate rounds, and which reviewers to spawn.

assertions.check: output names all three: Correctness, Architecture, and DX reviewers
output specifies full debate with up to 2 rounds

description: Hotfix mode caps at 2 reviewers regardless of diff size
query: This is a hotfix. The diff has 350 lines changed (large change due to cascading null checks). Configure Phase 4 review: show reviewer count and debate configuration.

assertions.text: Caps at 2 reviewers (not 3) despite large diff

assertions.check: output skips or excludes DX reviewer due to hotfix constraints

assertions.text: Cites hotfix constraint as reason for cap
assertions.check: output mentions hotfix mode, hotfix constraint, or 2-reviewer cap rule as reason
